# MeterRowData.ShowImagineCooldown field

When false the cooldown-seconds label beside the Imagine icon is hidden (the radial sweep on the icon stays). User toggle; also suppressed automatically at raid-20 density.

```csharp
public bool ShowImagineCooldown;
```
